title: Week 08 - 数组统计与最值
description: 练习在数组中寻找最值。

questions.title: 找出最高分

description.statement: 返回成绩数组中的最大值。

questions.reference_code:
function solution(scores)
    local best = scores[1]
    for i = 2, #scores do
        if scores[i] > best then
            best = scores[i]
        end
    end
    return best
end
